personality_one_liner: A highly functional, fast, and clear utility app designed for day-to-day shopkeeper billing.

spacing.rule: Generous padding for inputs to ensure large touch targets. Maintain tight groupings inside item cards.

do's: Use glassmorphism on the sticky bottom action bars over scrollable lists.
dont's: Do not use glass on form inputs or cards, to keep the utility feel.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Start a new bill or access saved bills.
screens.layout: Top section features the brand logo. Below it, a large, prominent text input for 'Customer Name'. The screen has a sticky bottom container with a primary 'Next' button (to proceed to bill creation) and a secondary 'Saved Bills' button.

screens.name: Bill Creation
screens.purpose: Enter dates and multi-row items for the bill.
screens.layout: Scrollable form layout. Top row has 'From Date' and 'To Date' pickers side-by-side. Below is a dynamic list of item cards. Each item card has text inputs for 'Item Name', 'Quantity' (numeric keyboard), and 'Rate' (numeric keyboard), with auto-calculated 'Amount' shown. Below the list is a '+ Add Item' secondary button. A sticky bottom bar displays the running Total Amount on the left, and a 'Generate Bill' primary button on the right.

screens.name: Bill Preview
screens.purpose: Display the formatted bill and provide sharing options.
screens.layout: A full-screen preview of the generated bill matching the provided PDF layout (deep navy blue borders, shop address, tabular items). A sticky glass bottom bar houses three primary actions: 'Share', 'Print', and 'Save'.

screens.name: Saved Bills

states.empty: Illustration of a blank receipt with 'No saved bills yet'.

screens.layout: Vertical list of cards. Each card displays Customer Name, Date Range, and Total Amount. Tapping a card opens the Bill Preview. Swipe-to-delete or a delete icon button on each card.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' (or system default sans-serif if not loading) for a clean, utilitarian typography scale.
Theme strictly uses the SRS Agency deep navy blue (#133A82) derived from the logo, pairing it with white and very light gray. No purple or indigo defaults.
On the Bill Creation screen, ensure the 'Amount' automatically calculates as Quantity * Rate.
Implement the Bill Preview strictly referencing the provided PDF format: it requires the shop address, phone numbers, signature line, and tabular structure.
The sticky bottom bar on the Bill Creation screen should use glassmorphism with the Total Amount on the left and 'Generate Bill' CTA on the right.
Use KeyboardAvoidingView for the item entry form to ensure input fields are not obscured.
Persist saved bills to local storage (AsyncStorage) since no auth/backend is required.
